description: Cross-binding fixtures for the v0.6.0 -> v0.7.0 pure-I/O data-loaders hard break (RFC pure-io-data-loaders 4.1, bead ess-v9a.7). Unlike the 0_1_to_0_2 migration (a transformation), this is a REJECTION contract: each `rejection` fixture is a pre-0.7.0 loader file that still carries a DataLoader block removed in v0.7.0, and every binding MUST reject it at load with the named, version-keyed diagnostic in `diagnostic` (mirroring apply_expression_template_version_too_old). The `acceptance` fixture is the migrated 0.7.0 shape and MUST load without error.
rule: A binding's load-time check reads the declared `esm` version; when it is < 0.7.0 and any `data_loaders.<name>` entry carries a `regridding` key, reject with diagnostic `data_loader_regridding_removed`; when it carries a `spatial` key, reject with `data_loader_spatial_removed`. The message names the v0.7.0 removal, echoes the declared version, points at RFC pure-io-data-loaders 4.1, and lists the offending loader paths. The native grid moves to a GDD Grid under `grid`; per-variable regridding moves to the owning model's `Model.regrid` map.
